title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech announces enhanced data analytics agents with built-in capabilities for data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. New developer tools include the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines enhanced data analytics agents with built-in capabilities for data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. The video covers new developer tooling: the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These integrations are accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and VSCode, extending agent access into common development environments.
